'''Kelmont''' was an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] of the small [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] garrison on [[Troska]], and a close friend of then [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Treyz Manech|Manech]]; however he was unaware that Manech was attempting to expose their [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]], [[Sev Buzk]], for his abuse of power. After Manech hired the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to deal with the rebellious [[Kyber Royal Family]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], during which Fett destroyed their [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] [[Refinery Six-Two-Two]] and killed the crown [[Prince/Legends|prince]], [[Torino Kyber]], Kelmont reported the events to Buzk, not knowing it was planned by Manech. The furious Buzk then ordered his men to attack the royal palace. Eventually, Kyber was arrested by the Empire for his extortion of the Kybers, and Manech was promoted to Sector [[Commander/Legends|Commander]], while Kelmont was rewarded for his loyalty with a promotion to Executive Adjunct.

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Overkill]]'' {{1st}}
